summary: Tested 3 new features: 1) ID number auto-populate on Bursary/Training forms - WORKING, 2) Document storage as base64 JSON - WORKING (backend verified, frontend code reviewed), 3) PDP approval workflow - WORKING. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle for accessibility - minor a11y issue

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 features implemented correctly and working
ID lookup endpoint properly excludes _id and password_hash from response
Document upload correctly converts files to base64 JSON with name, type, size, data fields
PDP approval workflow has proper status transitions: not_started -> pending_approval -> manager_approved -> ld_tracking
Employee sees Submit button for not_started/in_progress/rejected entries
Admin/Head sees Approve/Reject buttons for pending_approval entries
Admin sees L&D Track button for manager_approved entries

feature_1_id_lookup.GET /api/users/lookup-by-id?id_number=75: PASS - Returns employee details with found=true
feature_1_id_lookup.Bursary form auto-populate: PASS - Name, surname, division, department, race, gender auto-filled

feature_2_document_storage.Document upload stores base64 JSON: PASS - Backend test verified JSON storage with name, type, size, data
feature_2_document_storage.renderDocumentValue function: PASS - Code review confirms download links rendered for JSON documents
feature_2_document_storage.getSummarySection with doc detection: PASS - Code review confirms isDocSection check for document rendering

feature_3_pdp_approval_workflow.New statuses in STATUS_CONFIG: PASS - pending_approval, manager_approved, ld_tracking, rejected all present
feature_3_pdp_approval_workflow.Admin Approve/Reject buttons: PASS - Code verified for pending_approval entries
feature_3_pdp_approval_workflow.Admin L&D Track button: PASS - Code verified for manager_approved entries

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Employee_PDP entry for workflow testing (will be cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three features verified: 1) ID lookup auto-populates employee details on Bursary/Training forms when 13-digit SA ID entered, 2) Document uploads store base64 JSON with download links in application summaries, 3) PDP approval workflow with Submit (employee), Approve/Reject (admin/head), L&D Track (admin) buttons. All backend APIs working. Frontend integration verified.
